scripts.local.sqlfu.dev: pnpm --filter sqlfu-ui build && pnpm --filter sqlfu-ui local.sqlfu.dev -- --skip-build
scripts.website: cd website && node build.mjs && pnpx serve dist
scripts.build: pnpm --filter sqlfu build && pnpm --filter sqlfu-ui build && cd website && node build.mjs
scripts.test: pnpm --filter sqlfu test && pnpm --filter sqlfu-ui test
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter sqlfu typecheck && pnpm --filter sqlfu-ui typecheck
